/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/DilithiumClient.dir/DilithiumClient_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DilithiumClient.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DilithiumClient.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DilithiumClient.dir/src/apiclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DilithiumClient.dir/src/crypto.cpp.o -o DilithiumClient  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 -loqs -lssl -lcrypto -lzip /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
